text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's a pleasure to meet you. I am Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Using the blaze fierce, water still principle from
the Kongo Yaegaki style of martial arts, I hope to
produce excellent racing results, thus repaying
my grandparents for their teachings.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm placing myself under your capable
tutelage. Osu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
